sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82074" key="perisarkiste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περισαρκ-ιστέον</orth>, <sense id="n82074.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must make such an incision</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:16:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.6</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:5:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
